mapper.select: SELECT R.RESERV_ID, R.USER_ID, R.STORE_ID, R.RESERV_TIME, R.GUEST_COUNT, R.RESERV_STATUS, R.CREATE_DATE AS RESERV_DATE, S.STORE_NAME, S.STORE_ADDR, S.CATEGORY, 'Y' AS REVIEWABLE FROM RESERVATION R INNER JOIN STORE S ON R.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT JOIN USER_REVIEW UR ON R.RESERV_ID = UR.RESERV_ID WHERE R.USER_ID = #{userId} AND R.RESERV_STATUS = '완료' /* 완료된 예약만 */ AND UR.RESERV_ID IS NULL /* 리뷰 미작성 */ ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC /* 최신순 */

SELECT UR.RESERV_ID, UR.REVIEW, UR.REVIEW_PICTURE, UR.CREATE_DATE, UR.UPDATE_DATE, UR.RATING, UR.STATUS, R.USER_ID, R.STORE_ID, R.RESERV_TIME, R.GUEST_COUNT, R.RESERV_STATUS, R.CREATE_DATE AS RESERV_DATE, S.STORE_NAME, S.STORE_ADDR, S.CATEGORY, CASE WHEN CR.RESERV_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HAS_CEO_REPLY, CR.REVIEW AS CEO_REVIEW FROM USER_REVIEW UR INNER JOIN RESERVATION R ON UR.RESERV_ID = R.RESERV_ID INNER JOIN STORE S ON R.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT JOIN CEO_REVIEW CR ON UR.RESERV_ID = CR.RESERV_ID WHERE R.USER_ID = #{userId} AND UR.STATUS = '정상' /* 정상 상태 리뷰만 */ ORDER BY UR.CREATE_DATE DESC /* 최신순 */

SELECT UR.RESERV_ID, UR.REVIEW, UR.REVIEW_PICTURE, UR.CREATE_DATE, UR.UPDATE_DATE, UR.RATING, UR.STATUS, R.USER_ID, R.STORE_ID, R.RESERV_TIME, S.STORE_NAME, S.STORE_ADDR, S.CATEGORY, CASE WHEN CR.RESERV_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HAS_CEO_REPLY, CR.REVIEW AS CEO_REVIEW FROM USER_REVIEW UR INNER JOIN RESERVATION R ON UR.RESERV_ID = R.RESERV_ID INNER JOIN STORE S ON R.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT JOIN CEO_REVIEW CR ON UR.RESERV_ID = CR.RESERV_ID WHERE UR.RESERV_ID = #{reservId}

SELECT UR.RESERV_ID, UR.REVIEW, UR.REVIEW_PICTURE, UR.CREATE_DATE, UR.RATING, UR.STATUS, R.USER_ID, R.STORE_ID, S.STORE_NAME, CASE WHEN CR.RESERV_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HAS_CEO_REPLY, CR.REVIEW AS CEO_REVIEW FROM USER_REVIEW UR INNER JOIN RESERVATION R ON UR.RESERV_ID = R.RESERV_ID INNER JOIN STORE S ON R.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT JOIN CEO_REVIEW CR ON UR.RESERV_ID = CR.RESERV_ID WHERE R.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND UR.STATUS = '정상' ORDER BY UR.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_REVIEW ( RESERV_ID, REVIEW, REVIEW_PICTURE, CREATE_DATE, RATING, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{reservId}, #{review}, #{reviewPicture}, SYSDATE, /* 현재 시각 */ #{rating}, '정상' /* 기본 상태 */ )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_REVIEW SET REVIEW = #{review}, REVIEW_PICTURE = #{reviewPicture}, RATING = #{rating}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE RESERV_ID = #{reservId}
UPDATE USER_REVIEW SET STATUS = '삭제', UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE RESERV_ID = #{reservId} AND STATUS = '정상' /* 이미 삭제된 리뷰는 제외 */
